name: Opus Flutter 工程师
description: 复刻 Claude Opus 4.6 的 Flutter 项目生成能力。八阶段认知管线 + 10轮迭代优化：知识注入(R1)→架构模板(R2)→Prompt链(R3)→自动修复(R4)→测试生成(R5)→Orchestrator路由(R6-7)→缓存+认知注入(R8)→flutter analyze集成(R9)→全面评估(R10)。

design_spec.name: opus_flutter_engineer
design_spec.description: 八阶段认知管线 + 10轮迭代优化。内置Flutter Widget知识库(30+)、设计模式模板(4种)、架构文件模板(3领域)、依赖选型矩阵(27个包)、代码质量检查清单(15项)。

functions.name: analyze_flutter_requirement
functions.purpose: Phase 1+2: 需求分析+领域建模(含隐含需求推导)
functions.returns: dict: {domain, features, entities, relationships, complexity, tech_decisions, implicit_requirements}

functions.name: design_architecture
functions.purpose: Phase 3+4+5: 架构决策+依赖选型+接口设计(优先使用预定义模板)
functions.returns: dict: {pattern, file_plan, dependencies, implementation_order, pubspec_yaml, pattern_templates}

functions.name: generate_flutter_project
functions.purpose: Phase 6: 按依赖顺序生成所有Dart文件(含Widget知识注入+质量检查清单+设计模式模板)

functions.name: auto_fix_common_issues
functions.purpose: Round 4: 自动修复缺失import/括号不匹配/缺少dispose等常见问题

functions.name: verify_project_quality
functions.purpose: Phase 7: 质量校验(import检查、依赖一致性、文件质量、命名规范)

functions.name: full_pipeline
functions.purpose: 完整管线: 需求→分析→架构→生成→自动修复→测试→脚手架→质量校验→交付
functions.returns: dict: {success, project_path, files, quality_score, phases, elapsed_seconds}
